title: cordula dayana
intro: Cordula dayana, also known as Cordia dayana, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Boraginaceae family. It is native to tropical regions and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cordula dayana include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral effects. Herbal preparations of Cordula dayana can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
